RT @yfsscholarship: Coaches don't want to have to search for you.
Make it easy for them: clean social media, easy highlight links, direct…

Tips on Managing the Wind
Have you noticed that when you’re punting with the wind at your back, you’re struggling to turn the ball over? Many times, we feel the wind behind us, giving us the confidence that this is the direction we want to go.While a little breeze at your back… https://t.co/ZDSwX1lWuG https://t.co/fQ9H98VVDm

How we train matters!
I get asked all the time: How do I get faster? How do I get more explosive? The answer comes down to two things.
1) What you do in the weight room matters. If you're training like a left tackle or nose tackle, that's probably not the best approach for you… https://t.co/tfxUJnPIvY https://t.co/N1k0BpjP9f
